positive: A highly detailed, stylized silhouette of a playful fox embracing a geometric bouquet of celestial flora and abstract mountain peaks. The design utilizes strong negative space and positive shapes, featuring a palette of deep indigo, electric teal, burnt orange, and iridescent gold highlights. The fox's tail forms a dynamic curve, and the flowers integrate crisp, clean linework with subtle gradient washes. Composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for printing on a blank T-shirt or poster. Art Style: Minimalist Neo-Art Deco meets Japanese Sumi-e ink wash, vector graphic quality, high contrast, solid colors, linocut effect, ultra definition.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, fuzzy, dirty, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, jpeg artifacts, poorly drawn, grayscale only
